title: Fuel driver
content:
{{Top|leg}}
A '''fuel driver''' was a [[Starship/Legends|starship]] component, presumably related to the distribution of [[Fuel/Legends|fuel]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Quest: Path to Truth]]''
*[[Jedi Quest 1|''Jedi Quest'' 1]]
*[[Jedi Quest 2|''Jedi Quest'' 2]]
*[[Jedi Quest 3|''Jedi Quest'' 3]]
*[[Jedi Quest 4|''Jedi Quest'' 4]]
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]''

[[Category:Starship components]]
